metadata.feature_description: Agentic Filtering Framework using direct API tools and LlamaIndex. Domain-safe flow: search_skills (pgvector) → discover_api (cheat-sheet) → execute_request → ask_user_for_guidance on gaps → save_ifc_skill. Svelte chat UI at /agent with streaming SSE, guidance_request rendering, and provider-agnostic LLM config.

state.current_objective: All core plan steps and post-implementation enhancements complete. IFC skill guardrails (search_skills, ask_user_for_guidance, save_ifc_skill) and direct API calling (execute_request) implemented.

execution_log.step: Original MCP tools (get_project_schema, create_filter_set, add_filter_condition, apply_filter_set_to_context)
Replace sandbox with execute_request + discover_api direct API tooling
Add pgvector migration and ifc_skill table (infra/migrations/015)
Implement skill service (frontmatter, embedding, semantic search)
Enrich discover_api with IFC cheat-sheet mappings
Enforce domain-safe policy in workflow prompt (search first, no guessing)
Add guidance_request SSE event and frontend rendering
Stream agent metadata (thinking, tool calls) progressively
Tests for semantic search, guardrails, memorization flow

handoff_notes: Docker image (Dockerfile.age-pgvector) provides AGE + pgvector in one container. BroadcastChannel/postMessage payloads must be JSON-serializable (no proxies). Runtime context (branch_id, project_id) injected in sandbox_tools for tools that need it.
